features.name: module name exceeding 127 characters
features.description: Code should include a module with a name longer than 127 characters to trigger automatic file lookup issues

features.name: module instantiation with long hashed name
features.description: Code should include an instantiated module reference using a name that was hashed from a long original name exceeding 127 characters

features.name: multiple top-level modules with MULTITOP warning
features.description: Code should include multiple top-level modules to trigger MULTITOP warning and module lookup failures with long names

features.name: long module name file with specific prefix pattern
features.description: Code should include a module file with a long name containing a double underscore separator and Vhsh hash suffix pattern that exceeds 127 character limit
